title: URAファイナルズ決勝にむけて・再会

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Is that who I think it is?!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Hm... so you made it to the finals as well.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Hey, thanks for a great Unity Cup! That race
wouldn't have been half as good without you guys
there.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I appreciate what you did for Trainer
Kashimoto too!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
All right, enough chit-chat. It has nothing to do
with today's race.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
This time, my team is going to win. Brace yourself
for defeat.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: We're competing as individuals today, though...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Whatever. I only mixed up my words a little bit.
